result.name: Jorren Blacktide
result.description: Jorren Blacktide stands behind the bar, a broad-shouldered man with a weathered face that tells tales of the sea. His dark hair is streaked with silver, and his laugh is infectious, echoing through the tavern as he serves drinks to a mix of sailors and adventurers. The flickering lanterns cast shadows on his sturdy frame, while the kraken figurehead looms above, a fitting emblem for a man who knows the depths of both the ocean and the stories it holds. Jorren's presence is a blend of warmth and…

sections.name: Jorren Blacktide
sections.motive: To provide a welcoming atmosphere and gather tales from patrons.
sections.environment: The Drunken Kraken, a lively tavern filled with the scent of spiced rum and grilled fish.
sections.combat: Jorren prefers to avoid conflict, using his wit to diffuse tensions among rowdy patrons.
sections.interaction: Jorren is jovial and quick with a joke, but his keen eyes miss little, always assessing the mood of the room.
sections.use: As a source of local rumors and quests, Jorren can provide adventurers with leads on treasure or dangers at sea.
sections.gm_intrusion: Jorren may unexpectedly reveal a secret about a patron that leads to a twist in the story.
sections.loot: A small stash of coins hidden behind the bar, along with a few old maps of the surrounding waters.
sections.description: Jorren Blacktide stands behind the bar, a broad-shouldered man with a weathered face that tells tales of the sea. His dark hair is streaked with silver, and his laugh is infectious, echoing through the tavern as he serves drinks to a mix of sailors and adventurers. The flickering lanterns cast shadows on his sturdy frame, while the kraken figurehead looms above, a fitting emblem for a man who knows the depths of both the ocean and the stories it holds. Jorren's presence is a blend of warmth and authority, making him a beloved figure among the regulars.

combat: Jorren prefers to avoid conflict, using his wit to diffuse tensions among rowdy patrons.
interaction: Jorren is jovial and quick with a joke, but his keen eyes miss little, always assessing the mood of the room.
loot: A small stash of coins hidden behind the bar, along with a few old maps of the surrounding waters.
